channel.title: Groupware on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Groupware on Pi Stack

item.title: SOGo vs Zimbra vs EGroupware: Best Self-Hosted Groupware Suites 2026
item.description: Self-hosted groupware suites combine email, calendar, contacts, tasks, and collaboration tools into a single platform you control. Instead of relying on Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace, you run the entire stack on your own infrastructure — keeping your data private, avoiding vendor lock-in, and eliminating per-user licensing fees.
